de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.njml

Interface JmlParserVisitor<T>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
    All Superinterfaces:
    org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    JmlParserBaseVisitor

    public interface JmlParserVisitor<T>
extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
    This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by JmlParser.

    • Method Summary
